chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Revision Application No.S-32 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 20.11.2025 Mr.Jehanzaib @ Jansher Memon, Advocate for the applicant Mr.G.M Laghari, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 7 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G ****** For reasons to be recorded, the instant application is allowed and the impugned Order dated 19.3.2025 is set-aside. Learned trial Court shall decide the complaint in accordance with law, after recording evidence of the parties and affording them due right of audience. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
